【各位帅哥美女，能看到这本书，是我的荣幸，也是我们的缘分，不妨进来瞄瞄！】

墨凌城获得全能养成系统！
这个系统竟然，，，是这样子的！！！

既然成为校花的羽毛球教练，
正所谓——近水楼台先得月，
目光长远点，先定个小目标，
就这么决定了，绑定花灵诗！

在一起前：
墨凌城：“先定个小目标，拿捏花灵诗！”
花灵诗：“拿捏我？想多了！”

在一起后：
墨凌城：“给女朋友上个刑！”
花灵诗：“给男朋友上个刑！”

结婚之后：
墨凌城：“老婆低调点！”
花灵诗：“老公低调点！”

【舔狗，是丢掉自我的单方面感动；深情，是保留自我的宠溺与尊重。】
【恳请大家给点耐心，这不是单纯的爽文！耐心看下去，我会告诉你，这不是舔狗文！】
【在这个快节奏的时代，愿大家能遇到一个值得珍惜的女孩！】
【如果你想看女主白给、想看男主四处撩妹、不想思考什么叫双向奔赴、一心以为深情是舔狗，那么这里不适合你！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e13bce44f9d9c41c3ad73179ec63dae3","author":"墨语诗韵","author_id":"","book_id":"7090753155687779343","book_name":"被假高冷校花骗了，她喜欢被拿捏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303088","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6096人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7090758853607817761","read_count":"6096","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1238938"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"621","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,校花,单女主,1v1,无脑爽,全能,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a157cc644cd154f8931677d2f1733207~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434799&x-signature=4UhCjLeywNuHAC3Xghj4QPLn1A
